note:
{
  "experiment_overview": "The experiment involves the use of high-intensity focused ultrasound (HIFU) to generate cavitation in a phantom material. The goal is likely to study the effects of HIFU on tissue or other materials.",
  "procedures_observed": [
    "A person in a lab setting prepares a solution in a beaker using filtered water and TRIS buffer.",
    "The setup includes a control and DAQ computer, a function generator, a power amplifier, an impedance matching circuit, a TTL triggering system, a broadband detector, and a 532 nm pump laser.",
    "The HIFU transducer is positioned within a phantom material, which is placed in degassed filtered water.",
    "The experiment measures cavitation detection through graphs showing the time-domain signal of the detector voltage."
  ],
